original: Biologists estimate that as many as 2 million lesser prairie chickens — a kind of bird living on stretching grasslands — once lent red to the often gray landscape of the Midwestern and southwestern United States.
translation_literal: 生物学家估计，多达 200 万只小草原榛鸡，一种生活在绵延草原上的鸟，曾经给美国中西部和西南部常常灰色的景观增添红色。

chunks.english: that as many as 2 million lesser prairie chickens — a kind of bird living on stretching grasslands — once lent red to the often gray landscape of the Midwestern and southwestern United States
chunks.chinese: 多达 200 万只小草原榛鸡曾经给美国中西部和西南部常常灰色的景观增添红色

chunks.english: as many as 2 million lesser prairie chickens
chunks.chinese: 多达 200 万只小草原榛鸡

chunks.english: a kind of bird living on stretching grasslands
chunks.chinese: 一种生活在绵延草原上的鸟

chunks.english: to the often gray landscape of the Midwestern and southwestern United States
chunks.chinese: 给美国中西部和西南部常常灰色的景观
chunks.relation: 说明 lent red 的对象

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 名词 + 破折号解释 + 谓语
sentence_patterns.explanation: 破折号中的 a kind of bird... 解释 lesser prairie chickens，不是主句主干。

original: But just some 22,000 birds remain today, occupying about 16% of the species’ historic range.
translation_literal: 但是今天仅剩大约 22000 只鸟，占据该物种历史分布范围的大约 16%。

chunks.english: occupying about 16% of the species’ historic range
chunks.chinese: 占据该物种历史分布范围的大约 16%
chunks.relation: 补充说明剩余鸟群的分布范围

original: The crash was a major reason the U.S Fish and Wildlife Service (USFWS) decided to formally list the bird as threatened.
translation_literal: 这种暴跌是美国鱼类及野生动物管理局决定正式把这种鸟列为受威胁物种的一个主要原因。

chunks.english: the U.S Fish and Wildlife Service (USFWS) decided to formally list the bird as threatened
chunks.chinese: 美国鱼类及野生动物管理局决定正式把这种鸟列为受威胁物种的
chunks.relation: 省略 why/that 的定语从句，修饰 reason

chunks.english: the U.S Fish and Wildlife Service (USFWS)
chunks.chinese: 美国鱼类及野生动物管理局

chunks.english: to formally list the bird as threatened
chunks.chinese: 正式把这种鸟列为受威胁物种

sentence_patterns.explanation: reason 后省略关系词，后面整个从句解释 reason 的内容。

original: “The lesser prairie chicken is in a desperate situation,” said USFWS Director Daniel Ashe.
translation_literal: 美国鱼类及野生动物管理局局长丹尼尔·阿什说：“小草原榛鸡处在绝境中。”

chunks.chinese: 美国鱼类及野生动物管理局局长丹尼尔·阿什说

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 直接引语 + said + 发言人
sentence_patterns.explanation: said... 位于引语之后，只说明来源。

translation_literal: 然而，一些环保人士感到失望。

sentence_patterns.explanation: however 插在主语后，提示与前文转折。

original: They had pushed the agency to designate the bird as “endangered,” a status that gives federal officials greater regulatory power to crack down on threats.
translation_literal: 他们曾推动该机构把这种鸟指定为“濒危”物种，这一身份会给予联邦官员更大的监管权力来打击威胁。

chunks.chinese: 把这种鸟指定为“濒危”物种
chunks.relation: 补充说明推动该机构去做的事

chunks.english: a status that gives federal officials greater regulatory power to crack down on threats
chunks.chinese: 这一会给予联邦官员更大监管权力来打击威胁的身份
chunks.relation: 解释 endangered 这一身份

chunks.english: that gives federal officials greater regulatory power to crack down on threats
chunks.chinese: 会给予联邦官员更大监管权力来打击威胁的
联邦官员更大的监管权力

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 名词/标签 + a status + 定语从句
sentence_patterns.explanation: a status 解释 endangered，后面的 that 从句继续修饰 status。

original: But Ashe and others argued that the “threatened” tag gave the federal government flexibility to try out new, potentially less confrontational conservation approaches.
translation_literal: 但是阿什和其他人认为，“受威胁”这一标签给予联邦政府灵活性，去尝试新的、可能更少对抗性的保护方法。

chunks.english: that the “threatened” tag gave the federal government flexibility to try out new, potentially less confrontational conservation approaches
chunks.chinese: “受威胁”这一标签给予联邦政府灵活性，去尝试新的、可能更少对抗性的保护方法

chunks.english: to try out new, potentially less confrontational conservation approaches
chunks.chinese: 去尝试新的、可能更少对抗性的保护方法的

original: In particular, they called for forging closer collaborations with western state governments, which are often uneasy with federal action and with the private landowners who control an estimated 95% of the prairie chicken’s habitat.
translation_literal: 特别是，他们呼吁与西部州政府建立更密切的合作，而这些州政府常常对联邦行动以及控制估计 95% 草原榛鸡栖息地的私人土地所有者感到不安。

chunks.english: forging closer collaborations with western state governments
chunks.chinese: 与西部州政府建立更密切的合作
chunks.relation: 作 called for 的宾语

chunks.english: which are often uneasy with federal action and with the private landowners who control an estimated 95% of the prairie chicken’s habitat
chunks.chinese: 这些州政府常常对联邦行动以及控制估计 95% 草原榛鸡栖息地的私人土地所有者感到不安

chunks.relation: which 定语从句内部主语
which 定语从句内部谓语

chunks.english: often uneasy with federal action and with the private landowners
chunks.chinese: 常常对联邦行动以及私人土地所有者感到不安

chunks.english: who control an estimated 95% of the prairie chicken’s habitat
chunks.chinese: 控制估计 95% 草原榛鸡栖息地的

chunks.relation: who 定语从句内部主语
who 定语从句内部谓语

chunks.english: an estimated 95% of the prairie chicken’s habitat
chunks.chinese: 估计 95% 的草原榛鸡栖息地

sentence_patterns.pattern_name: 分裂结构 / 间隔结构
sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 主句 + which 从句 + who 从句
sentence_patterns.explanation: which 从句修饰 governments，who 从句修饰 landowners，不能都挂到主句谓语上。

original: Under the plan, for example, the agency said it would not prosecute landowner or businesses that unintentionally kill, harm, or disturb the bird, as long as they had signed a range-wide management plan to restore prairie chicken habitat.
translation_literal: 例如，根据该计划，该机构说，只要土地所有者或企业已经签署一项恢复草原榛鸡栖息地的全范围管理计划，它就不会起诉那些无意中杀死、伤害或惊扰这种鸟的土地所有者或企业。

chunks.english: it would not prosecute landowner or businesses that unintentionally kill, harm, or disturb the bird, as long as they had signed a range-wide management plan to restore prairie chicken habitat
chunks.chinese: 只要他们签署了恢复草原榛鸡栖息地的全范围管理计划，它就不会起诉无意中杀死、伤害或惊扰这种鸟的土地所有者或企业

chunks.relation: 宾语从句内部主语，指 agency

chunks.english: that unintentionally kill, harm, or disturb the bird
chunks.chinese: 无意中杀死、伤害或惊扰这种鸟的

chunks.relation: that 定语从句内部并列谓语

chunks.english: as long as they had signed a range-wide management plan to restore prairie chicken habitat
chunks.chinese: 只要他们已经签署一项恢复草原榛鸡栖息地的全范围管理计划

chunks.relation: as long as 从句内部主语
as long as 从句内部谓语

chunks.chinese: 恢复草原榛鸡栖息地的
这些土地所有者或企业
chunks.relation: that 定语从句内部主语，指 landowner or businesses

sentence_patterns.explanation: 定语从句中三个动作并列，说明可能造成的无意伤害。

original: Negotiated by USFWS and the states, the plan requires individuals and businesses that damage habitat as part of their operations to pay into a fund to replace every acre destroyed with 2 new acres of suitable habitat.
translation_literal: 由美国鱼类及野生动物管理局和各州协商制定的该计划，要求那些在经营活动中破坏栖息地的个人和企业向一个基金缴款，用每破坏一英亩替换两英亩新的适宜栖息地。

chunks.english: Negotiated by USFWS and the states
chunks.chinese: 由美国鱼类及野生动物管理局和各州协商制定的

chunks.english: individuals and businesses that damage habitat as part of their operations
chunks.chinese: 在经营活动中破坏栖息地的个人和企业

chunks.english: that damage habitat as part of their operations
chunks.chinese: 在经营活动中破坏栖息地的

chunks.relation: that 定语从句内部主语
that 定语从句内部谓语
补充说明 requires 的宾语要做什么

chunks.english: to replace every acre destroyed with 2 new acres of suitable habitat
chunks.chinese: 用两英亩新的适宜栖息地替换每一英亩被破坏的栖息地的

sentence_patterns.pattern_name: 分裂结构 / 间隔结构
sentence_patterns.explanation: requires 的宾语 individuals and businesses 后带定语从句，真正的宾补是 to pay...。

original: The fund will also be used to compensate landowners who set aside habitat, USFWS also set an interim goal of restoring prairie chicken populations to an annual average of 67,000 birds over the next 10 years.
translation_literal: 该基金还将被用来补偿留出栖息地的土地所有者，美国鱼类及野生动物管理局还设定了一个临时目标，即在未来 10 年把草原榛鸡数量恢复到年均 67000 只。

chunks.english: The fund will also be used to compensate landowners who set aside habitat
chunks.chinese: 该基金还将被用来补偿留出栖息地的土地所有者

chunks.english: to compensate landowners who set aside habitat
chunks.chinese: 用来补偿留出栖息地的土地所有者

chunks.english: USFWS also set an interim goal of restoring prairie chicken populations to an annual average of 67,000 birds over the next 10 years
chunks.chinese: 美国鱼类及野生动物管理局还设定了一个临时目标，即在未来 10 年把草原榛鸡数量恢复到年均 67000 只
chunks.relation: 第二分句，与第一分句并列

chunks.chinese: 美国鱼类及野生动物管理局

chunks.english: of restoring prairie chicken populations to an annual average of 67,000 birds over the next 10 years
chunks.chinese: 在未来 10 年把草原榛鸡数量恢复到年均 67000 只的

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: A will be used..., USFWS also set...
sentence_patterns.explanation: 逗号连接两个并列分句，分别说明基金用途和机构目标。

original: And it gives the Western Association of Fish and Wildlife Agencies (WAFWA), a coalition of state agencies, the job of monitoring progress.
translation_literal: 并且它把监督进展的工作交给西部鱼类及野生动物机构协会，一个州机构联盟。

chunks.english: the Western Association of Fish and Wildlife Agencies (WAFWA)
chunks.chinese: 西部鱼类及野生动物机构协会
chunks.relation: 作 gives 的间接宾语
作 gives 的直接宾语

sentence_patterns.explanation: a coalition of state agencies 解释 WAFWA 的性质。

original: Overall, the idea is to let “states” remain in the driver’s seat for managing the species,” Ashe said.
translation_literal: 阿什说，总体而言，这一想法是让“各州”在管理该物种方面保持主导地位。

chunks.english: to let “states” remain in the driver’s seat for managing the species
chunks.chinese: 让各州在管理该物种方面保持主导地位

chunks.relation: 补充说明 states 的状态

sentence_patterns.explanation: Ashe said 是引语来源，主干是 the idea is to let states remain...。

original: Not everyone buys the win-win rhetoric.
translation_literal: 并不是每个人都相信这种双赢说法。

original: Some Congress members are trying to block the plan, and at least a dozen industry groups, four states, and three environmental groups are challenging it in federal court.
translation_literal: 一些国会议员正试图阻止该计划，并且至少十几个行业组织、四个州和三个环保组织正在联邦法院质疑它。

chunks.english: Some Congress members are trying to block the plan
chunks.chinese: 一些国会议员正试图阻止该计划

chunks.english: at least a dozen industry groups, four states, and three environmental groups are challenging it in federal court
chunks.chinese: 至少十几个行业组织、四个州和三个环保组织正在联邦法院质疑它
chunks.relation: 第二分句，与前一分句并列

chunks.english: at least a dozen industry groups, four states, and three environmental groups
chunks.chinese: 至少十几个行业组织、四个州和三个环保组织

chunks.relation: 作 challenging 的宾语，指 the plan

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: A are trying..., and B are challenging...
sentence_patterns.explanation: and 连接两个分句；第二分句主语本身又由三类群体并列构成。

original: Not surprisingly, doesn’t go far enough.
translation_literal: 不足为奇的是，它还远远不够。

chunks.relation: 原文省略的主语，指该计划或联邦行动

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 省略主语 + doesn’t go far enough
sentence_patterns.explanation: 原句缺少显性主语，需要根据上下文补出 it，指该计划力度不足。

original: “The federal government is giving responsibility for managing the bird to the same industries that are pushing it to extinction,” says biologist Jay Lininger.
translation_literal: 生物学家杰伊·利宁格说：“联邦政府正在把管理这种鸟的责任交给那些正在把它推向灭绝的同一批行业。”

chunks.relation: 作 giving 的直接宾语

chunks.english: to the same industries that are pushing it to extinction
chunks.chinese: 给那些正在把它推向灭绝的同一批行业

chunks.english: that are pushing it to extinction

chunks.relation: that 定语从句内部主语
that 定语从句内部谓语
作 pushing 的宾语，指 the bird
说明 pushing 的结果方向

chunks.chinese: 生物学家杰伊·利宁格说

sentence_patterns.pattern_name: 分裂结构 / 间隔结构
sentence_patterns.pattern_form: give A to B + 定语从句
sentence_patterns.explanation: giving 的直接宾语是 responsibility，to 后对象 industries 又带定语从句。
